title: helichrysum obductum
intro: Helichrysum obductum, also known as the yellow everlast or mountain everlast, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum obductum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Helichrysum obductum can be prepared into various herbal products such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
